name: Jojo's Bizarre RPG (COMPLETE) JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Phantom Blood Battle Tendency Stardust Crusaders Diamond is Unbreakable Golden Wind Stone Ocean Steel Ball Run JoJolion The JoJolands Eyes of Heaven (alternate universe) Jonathan Joestar Dio Brando Wi
description:
315,000+ TOKEN LOREBOOK — The Complete JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Franchise — The Most Expansive, Most Faithful JoJo RPG Ever Built On This Platform

550+ Lorebook Entries  •  315,000+ Tokens  •  13,242-Token World Engine  •  9 Complete Parts  •  Zero Filler  •  Zero Padding

Parts 1 Through 9. Every Stand. Every Timeline. Every Character. Canon Route, Villain Route, AU Route, OC Route. No Ceiling. No Exceptions. Your Bizarre Adventure Starts Now.

"When DIO was revived, the Joestar bloodline awakened. This is no longer about one man. This is about destiny across a century."

⚠️ THIS IS NOT A BOT. THIS IS A BIZARRE WORLD. ⚠️

You have seen JoJo bots before. You have not seen this. Every other JoJo RPG on this platform follows the same pattern: a thin system prompt, a handful of Stand descriptions copy-pasted from a wiki, and an AI that forgets King Crimson's rules after two exchanges, plays DIO like a generic bully, and has never once rendered Gyro Zeppeli's puns with the loving, elaborate, deeply unnecessary detail they deserve. Those bots sound like JoJo for one scene. They fall apart the moment you push them.

This RPG is built differently. The lorebook contains over 550 canonical entries exceeding 315,000 tokens — every named Stand with stats, abilities, weaknesses, and exploitation vectors; every arc beat across all nine Parts; every character; every location; every power system; every faction; every supernatural mechanic. Every entry substantive. Every entry mechanical. Not padded. Not faked. Not a Shadow World that collapses when you examine it.

On top of that lorebook: a 13,242-token world engine with protocol blocks for Stand combat logic, player agency enforcement, scene-opening immersion, villain-play adversarial balance, OC Stand generation, secondary awakening triggers, AU facilitation, per-Part tone registers, dual-timeline continuity, damage reflection, Stand User attraction, Chariot Requiem's soul-migration rules, and canonical NPC voice registers. This is the real thing.

IF ANOTHER JOJO RPG DOESN'T TELL YOU THEIR EXACT ENTRY COUNT AND TOKEN COUNT — ASSUME IT'S A WIKI SCRAPE IN A TRENCH COAT. ASSUME IT'S HOLLOW.

550+ ENTRIES  •  315,000+ TOKENS  •  13,242-TOKEN ENGINE  •  9 PARTS  •  ZERO FILLER  •  ZERO PADDING

✦ THE LARGEST JOJO'S BIZARRE ADVENTURE FRANCHISE RPG EVER BUILT. NOTHING ELSE COMES CLOSE. ✦

⚠️ CONTENT: FULL JOJO FRANCHISE — AUTHENTIC AND UNFILTERED ⚠️

STAND BATTLES WITH LETHAL CONSEQUENCES  •  DEATH THAT LANDS AND STAYS  •  VAMPIRISM AND BODY HORROR  •  SERIAL KILLERS WITH QUIET LIVES  •  COSMIC HORROR WEARING A PRIEST'S COLLAR  •  BETRAYAL BY THE PEOPLE CLOSEST TO YOU  •  SACRIFICE WITH NO CLEAN RESOLUTION  •  VILLAIN ROUTES FULLY SUPPORTED  •&
creator: Rfergeegr
